title: rubus × serpentiformis
intro: Rubus × serpentiformis, also known as the Serpent's Gold or Red-veined Rhus, is a hybrid species of raspberry and is not a true Rhus, but rather a misnamed Rubus species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus × serpentiformis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
